From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 15 Apr 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-04-15
Message-ID: <4vF4DocoSriCaUL_B6FN8g@geopod-ismtpd-36>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="9fa66b99a5b17ab560a4a495e7be43d6d3272a9a3cd6621e9db87b226e91"

Hi there, Llama Lovers! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including the
launch of LlamaResearcher, a new tool for deep research,
enhancements to our agent workflows, and the introduction of a
powerful new layout agent. Dive into the highlights below and
explore our tutorials and guides to maximize your experience with
these innovative features.

If you haven't explored LlamaCloud yet, make sure to sign up 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uRZpXbDX00xgsIAMJJ8Eb8a6T6As2VeTj6cP5Mw360M ) and get in touch with us 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.tne7dBfnndKaZBdUr47keDckvSBfjecdO836uqeyYu0 ) to discuss your specific
enterprise use case.

🤩 The Highlights:

* LlamaResearcher - Deep Research with Llama4: A fully
open-source project by Clelia Bertelli that offers a complete
deep research solution using Llama4. It allows users to submit
queries, evaluate them for safety, and generate essays based on
web searches. Learn more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QkcueSLJ1ey3zdR-TRRbPB_gDU_BgcpchVN1K7irq_g ), Repo 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nMT9TtnI3LtbciUAWOXHKRg_2hHzSGZBKXkDUd58BRc ).
* MCP Server Management Tool: A handy tool by Marcus Schiesser
that simplifies the discovery, installation, configuration, and
removal of MCP servers from a single CLI interface. Discover more
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JBxJ4JcnNwfSML548eBUDThjtHQL7Ip5-sSJFP6y0eg ).
* Multimodal Agent Workflows: A significant update enabling
multi-agent systems to handle interleaved text and image
messages, enhancing reasoning capabilities. Guide here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v_wuNI7VH6BLO4_g7P09G70WJUEkKNREZ1sZmy1xAOA ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* Grounding Agents with Visual Citations: A new tutorial that
shows how to ground agents with visual citations using
LlamaParse's layout agent feature. Check it out 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SlWcsOh0r8FrHIbMdxMfnf4iJCVlQL1c6-UDdsD4fSc ).

✨ Framework:

* New Layout Agent: A state-of-the-art layout agent that enhances
document parsing and extraction with precise visual
citations. Learn more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vY8WMuIP51_GAPuHjGcsSvFf3TbzuHEbUqdGSCfs7HA ).
* Building RAG Workflows: A quickstart tutorial on building a RAG
workflow from scratch using Llama 4, focusing on ingestion,
retrieval, and generation. Get started ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o0-yMsditYPZo_SGjPaIkjuvhkNZmVTJtL7OiEUmAxI ) .

✍️ Community:

* Auth for GenAI: Excited to see @auth0's Auth for GenAI ship
with native @llama_index support, simplifying authentication in
agent workflows. Explore the SDK ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..D8QfGpSzWAUe6SsuO8IaoZ9D5YPGom4OUeGKM--ojQI ).
* Building a Full-Stack Agent Application: A massive upgrade to
create-llama, allowing you to spin up a web application with just
one line of code. Check it out 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..34pyR-g2U6oVgLfTW52UJMgjd-SkIGzti1TywPxIHoI ).
* Comparing Llama 4 and DeepSeek-R1: A community comparison of
Llama 4 and DeepSeek-R1 using RAG techniques. Learn more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..e2Qlcqqu3KpqNtfTd1nHBSM1U3mnQejhTD-VDzCZM14 ).

Thank you for being part of our community! We look forward to
seeing how you leverage these new features and enhancements in
your projects. Stay tuned for more updates!

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QUHayRyRgc-tuFrD4QeiAto_Vfv3Clf1v-KI5jyGdWg )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6rxPNkdHGFT_YDbWo2MPDo2pJcwsRat8bxwflYKKJQ8 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..t8jqe9yNcmTt7UyGaBFH-n1NE4JsodQJbdJ0C4FMemI )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
